title: README.md
body_text:
# Synthesis fixtures

Tiny corpus for `tests/test_synthesis.py`. The graph is built directly in the
test (no extractor pass), so this directory is intentionally minimal — kept as
a hook for future fixture expansion (e.g. a real markdown corpus the extractor
ingests). The README is checked in so the directory is tracked.
body:
# Synthesis fixtures

Tiny corpus for `tests/test_synthesis.py`. The graph is built directly in the
test (no extractor pass), so this directory is intentionally minimal — kept as
a hook for future fixture expansion (e.g. a real markdown corpus the extractor
ingests). The README is checked in so the directory is tracked.
